---
title: "About me"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="about-layout">
  <div class="about-intro-row">
  <div class="about-photo-column">
    <div class="about-photo-slot" aria-label="Profile photo" style="border:none;background:transparent;padding:0;min-height:20rem;">
      <img src="images/headshot.jpeg" alt="Headshot of Robert Shaw" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:0.5rem;">
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top: 0.8rem;">
      <a href="CV_ROBERT_SHAW.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Click here to view my CV</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-content-column">
```
<div style="text-align: justify; text-justify: inter-word;">
I’m an Accounting and Finance student graduating in 2026, with a strong interest in finance, data analytics, programming, and sports betting analysis. I enjoy working on projects that involve solving real problems, especially where I can combine commercial thinking with technology and automation. Alongside my studies, I work with U.S. Bank | Elavon as a Process Improvement and Automation Intern. I originally joined as a summer intern and was later kept on during the year on a 20-hour-per-week contract alongside my final year of studies. In September, I will be starting their graduate programme as a Process Transformation and Finance Graduate. During my time there, I created the first AI agent to be released into production in the entire 70,000-person organisation, built the first Power BI dashboard to monitor Copilot usage data and provide management with clearer analytics, trained over 300 people in sales and revenue-generating roles on using AI to improve commercial outcomes, and supported the development and implementation of wider process improvement initiatives.
</div>

```{=html}
  </div>
  </div>
```

## Get in touch

- ```{=html}
  <img src="images/email_icon.png" alt="Email icon" style="width:1.15rem;height:1.15rem;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:0.4rem;">
  <a href="mailto:robshaw03@icloud.com">robshaw03@icloud.com</a> /
  <a href="mailto:robert.shaw5@mail.dcu.ie">robert.shaw5@mail.dcu.ie</a>
  ```
- ```{=html}
  <img src="images/phone_icon.png" alt="Phone icon" style="width:1.15rem;height:1.15rem;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:0.4rem;">
  <a href="tel:0830317895">0830317895</a>
  ```
- ```{=html}
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-shaw-8b72b9293/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Open LinkedIn profile">
    <img src="images/linkedin_icon.png" alt="LinkedIn icon" style="width:1.15rem;height:1.15rem;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:0.4rem;">
    <span>LinkedIn</span>
  </a>
  ```

```{=html}
</section>
```
